articles.headline: ST Engineering iDirect Foresight addresses fundamental satcom shift

articles.takeaway: LEO satellite operators' vertical integration and low-latency capabilities are forcing traditional satcom providers to restructure service models, directly impacting aircraft connectivity economics.

articles.headline: Albedo prepares second VLEO mission for 2027 launch

Vicinity, scheduled to launch in 2027, will deploy solar arrays to provide far more power than the solar...
articles.takeaway: Albedo's shift to manufacturing with deployable solar arrays addresses the critical power-generation challenge limiting VLEO satellite capabilities and operational duration.

articles.headline: Safety Culture in Aviation SMS
articles.blurb: How organizational culture shapes safety outcomes and what it takes to build a reporting culture that supports SMS.

articles.blurb: AA is getting hit in the FAA crackdown.

articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. This paper reviews how advanced technologies and methods can expand capacity and improve efficiency across airline, airport, and flight operations. It also highlights emerging trends and gaps for future research in sustainable aviation.
articles.takeaway: Operational optimization across airlines, airports, and flight management offers a near-term pathway to handle capacity growth while reducing environmental impact before new aircraft technologies mature.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts

articles.headline: How Many Aircraft Are Scrapped Every Year?
articles.blurb: Between 500 and 650 commercial aircraft are retired annually, with the industry experiencing waves and troughs.
articles.takeaway: Aircraft retirement cycles create predictable supply surges of components and materials, enabling strategic planning for MRO providers and sustainability-focused operators.
